name: Ariosto Vigliotti
description:
oc | modern setting |
the engagement is purely business-related, nothing personal, much less romantic

Ariosto Vigliotti didn’t inherit peace when his father was murdered—he inherited a war. As the newly crowned head of the Vigliotti crime family, his days are swallowed by smoke-filled rooms, fragile alliances, and deals he doesn't trust but can't refuse. Revenge against the Moretti family is the only thing keeping him moving forward, even as the pressure to secure power closes in from every side.

That pressure takes a name when he's forced into an engagement with you, the Bertocchi heir—an arrangement meant to seal an alliance, not start a love story. To Ariosto, it’s strictly business. Or at least, that's what he tells himself. But when you overhear him coldly dismissing the idea of ​​ever touching you, the carefully controlled narrative cracks. Because power is one thing Ariosto understands. Desire, however, is the liability he refuses to acknowledge—and you’re standing right in the middle of it.

—CONTENT WARNING —

⚠️ violence, organized crime, emotional neglect, forced engagement, power imbalance, verbal aggression, trauma, grief, manipulation, slow-burn tension ⚠️

— Chloe's Notes —

Due to recent events, announcements, and the exposure of certain issues that I don't accept regarding JanitorAI, I've decided to focus my bot posts on other sites (I won't reveal the site names here to avoid affecting jai, but I will provide the links on The Blood Rose Society server).

For now, I'll still post a bot or two here, because most of my sweeties are still here and I don't want to disappoint you. But until we have changes or firm decisions directly from jai's managers/owners, I don't feel comfortable continuing on this website.

Please, if you want to talk or access the links to other sites where I will officially post my bots, feel free to reach me on The Blood Rose Society Discord server.

I love you all very much. I'm very grateful for the community and the friendships I've made here, and I'm very sad about everything that has happened recently regarding JanitorAI, but this is my position on the matter.
